title: Man rede mir nicht von Liebe
writer: Curt J. Braun, Hugo Maria Kritz
actors: Heidemarie Hatheyer, Mathias Wieman, Friedrich Domin
plot: Young Pamela (Heidemarie Hatheyer) is a painter and moves to Munich to make some money there. Soon she meets the great artist Andreas Alwin (Mathias Wieman), who promotes her. Eventually they fall in love with each other. Pamela o...
